reviews.comment:
Llegamos a las 16 hs y no tenian combustible. Nunca nos dieron información de cuando tendrian. A las 23 hs nos dicen que con suerte el camion llegaba al otro dia y como por arte de magia a las 0 hs nos vendieron nafta. Si tenian al menos algo porque nos hicieron esperar 8hs. La comida y cafe muy caros y poca variedad.

(Translated by Google)
We arrived at 4 PM and they had no fuel. They never gave us any information about when they would get more. At 11 PM they told us that, with luck, the truck would arrive the next day, and as if by magic, at midnight they sold us gasoline. If they had any at all, why did they make us wait 8 hours? The food and coffee were very expensive and there was little variety.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJdFllS1pBEAE

reviews.comment:
La gente que atiende tiene el humor fluctuante, de repente son amables, de repente lo contrario. Traten de llegar a ese lugar con medio tanque de combustible lleno, en ocasiones las colas para cargar combustible son de veinte minutos mínimo en verano.

(Translated by Google)
The staff are moody; one minute they're friendly, the next they're not. Try to arrive with half a tank of gas, as the lines to fill up can be at least twenty minutes long in the summer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJek42c0VBEAE
